name: git
description: Git MCP server for repository management and version control operations

tools.name: git_get_repo_status
tools.description: Get the current status of the repository (modified files, staged changes, etc.)

repo_path.description: Path to the git repository (defaults to current directory)

tools.name: git_get_commit_history
tools.description: Retrieve commit history for analysis and code review context

max_commits.description: Maximum number of commits to retrieve

tools.name: git_get_diff
tools.description: Get diff between commits or branches for code review
